observed: For the Chapter 2 GPIM baseline, net-value weights are defined separately from physical survival as V_i(j)=S_i(j)(1-d_i)^j, where S_i(j) is the locked asset-specific Weibull survival schedule and the externally documented declining-balance age-price rates are d_ME=0.110 and d_NRC=0.024. These rates are age-price/depreciation anchors only; they are not retirement rates, productive-efficiency profiles, FAAt402 price indexes, NFC output deflators, or final capital-price indexes.

validation_rule: parameter ledger has exactly ME and NRC rows
age-price profile locked separately from survival
NFC output price not baseline capital-price route
S12D-B authorization requires recorded manual lock
